stories.title: US Touts Iran Deal Prospects Amid Fresh Hormuz Tensions
stories.summary: The US is touting progress toward a peace deal with Iran to end the nearly three-month war, despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the Strait of Hormuz. Bloomberg's Derek Wallbank has the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: SK Hynix hits $1 trillion valuation as AI boom lifts South Korean chip stocks
stories.summary: Shares of SK Hynix soared over 11% on Wednesday, pushing the South Korean memory-chip maker above the $1 trillion market capitalization mark.

stories.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
stories.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

stories.title: Insilico teams up with US firm to build AI models predicting disease decades ahead
stories.summary: Hong Kong-listed artificial intelligence drug-discovery company Insilico Medicine has struck a collaboration with US-headquartered Human Longevity to co-develop what they describe as “the industry’s first large-scale” AI foundation models capable of predicting diseases – such as cancer – decades before clinical symptoms appear. The partnership was announced as the global longevity market, fuelled

stories.title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
stories.summary: The breakneck surge in memory-chip stocks is intensifying, sending the market capitalizations of SK Hynix Inc. and Micron Technology Inc. above $1 trillion for the first time, as investors bet the AI boom will lead to a sustained revaluation of the industry.

stories.title: Sen. Scott: Trump Won’t Punt Iran Nuclear Demands
stories.summary: Senator Rick Scott (R-FL), a member of the Senate Foreign Relations and Armed Services Committees, says he would be “shocked” if President Trump agreed to delay the nuclear component of any Iran deal, warning the choice is “unbelievable hostilities or a deal” and saying more military strikes may be needed to eliminate Iran’s nuclear capability. stories.title: UK imposes sanctions on crypto exchange tied to billionaire Justin Sun
stories.summary: Foreign Office announces measures against Huobi among several entities it says helped Russia evade economic pressure

stories.title: Oil Dips as US Sees Progress in Iran Deal Despite Fresh Tensions
stories.summary: Oil edged lower on optimism that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal despite fresh hostilities and uncertainty over the vital Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: US Consumer Confidence Slips on Price Concerns| Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/26/2026
stories.summary: Today, Chris Kennedy, Bloomberg Economics lead on economic statecraft, breaks down the latest in negotiations between the US and Iran as the two sides traded renewed strikes over the weekend. Then, Peter Atwater, president of Financial Insyghts, discusses the 'K-shaped economy' as war fueled inflation squeezes consumers across the US. Plus, Louise Phillips Forbes discusses New York City Mayor Zohr

stories.title: SEC Chief Atkins Pumps the Brakes on Prediction-Market Funds
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Vildana Hajric and Bloomberg Intelligence's James Seyffart join Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The top US securities regulator is delaying the launch of a wave of novel exchange-traded funds that would let investors wager on events such as elections and economic data as the agency weighs how far the $15 trillion ETF wrapper can stretch. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Treasury yields slide after Memorial Day break as traders weigh Iran peace prospects
stories.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell more than 6 basis points to 4.510%.

stories.title: Micron hits $1 trillion market cap for the first time as stock surges 19%
stories.summary: A global memory shortage driven by AI is spiking demand for chipmakers like Micron.

stories.title: Nine Crypto Whales Dominate Polymarket Disputes Worth Billions
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Andre Tartar joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Nine anonymous cryptocurrency wallets have effectively gained control over who wins and loses on Polymarket’s most contested prediction market bets, giving a tiny group of unappointed people outsized power over billions of dollars of wagers. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Micron Gets Boost on Tight Chip Supplies, Pilling Says
stories.summary: Daniel Pilling, a portfolio manager at Sands Capital Management LLC, says the rally for Micron Technology Inc. shares is a reflection of how demand for artificial intelligence chips is outstripping supply. He speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on ``Bloomberg Tech.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.summary: Asia-Pacific markets rose on Wednesday, with Japan and South Korea's benchmark indices hitting new highs

stories.title: Iran war impact to hit household energy bills for the first time
stories.summary: A household using a typical amount of gas and electricity is forecast to pay about £200 more a year.

stories.title: Michael Allen: 'Decreasing Number of Options' on Iran
stories.summary: Michael Allen, Beacon Global Strategies Managing Director, says President Trump and his team have a decreasing number of options to secure a deal with Iran, citing concerns that any agreement could be vague and may not deliver the concessions the US needs. Allen also says Operation Epic Fury and the subsequent conflict could end up being a strategic loss for the United States if the US is unable t

stories.title: Climate Change Fueling Growth of Antibiotic-Resistant Salmonella
stories.summary: Climate change is linked to a 10% global increase in antibiotic-resistance genes in Salmonella, according to new research that suggests warming temperatures and shifting rainfall patterns could accelerate the spread of hard-to-treat infections.

stories.title: Stocks Rise Toward Record on Iran Peace Hopes | The Close 5/26/2026
stories.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. stories.title: UK, Poland Sign Defense and Security Pact to Curb Russia Threat
stories.summary: The UK is poised to sign a new defense and security pact with Poland, as the NATO allies seek to curb the threat posed by Russia.

stories.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Has More Bitcoin Than Estimated, SEC Filing Shows
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Elon Musk’s SpaceX holds more than twice as much Bitcoin as previously estimated. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Jefferies Says Investors Boost ‘Nuclear Exposure’: ESG Investing
stories.summary: Almost two-thirds of fund managers permit some level of “nuclear exposure,” with 34% allowing investments in nuclear weaponry, according to Jefferies Financial Group Inc.’s fourth-annual ESG and defense survey.

stories.title: Kaiko CEO Discusses Events-Driven Contract Infrastructure
stories.summary: Ambre Soubiran, CEO of Kaiko, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss the rapid growth of prediction markets and how data is key for the industry's infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Prediction Regulation 'Needs Fine-Tuning': Fmr. CFTC Chair
stories.summary: Christopher Giancarlo, incoming senior adviser investment banking at Jefferies and former CFTC chair, joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." They discuss prediction markets, regulating digital assets, and resources at the CFTC. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: SEC Delays Plan Allowing for Crypto Versions of US Stocks
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Scott Patterson joins Isabelle Lee and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The SEC is delaying a plan to provide broad exemptions for US crypto firms to trade tokenized assets linked to stocks, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: The Cost of Teaching Wall Street Bankers to Use AI Tools
stories.summary: As Wall Street is getting caught up in AI angst and looking to hire more AI specialists and shrink traditional banking roles, two highly sought-after AI trainers in finance are charging $25,000 for a day of training. Bloomberg's Sally Bakewell joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Chipmaker ETF rides AI excitement to quickest $10bn valuation on record
stories.summary: Roundhill Memory ETF, known as DRAM, surges 87% within 50 days of April launch

stories.title: Qualcomm to Supply Chips to TikTok Owner ByteDance
stories.summary: Qualcomm will supply chips to TikTok owner ByteDance for artificial intelligence data centers, according to people familiar with the matter. Ian King helped break the story and he reports on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: AI’s Massive Power Problem
stories.summary: The AI data center boom is becoming an industrial arms race. CyrusOne CEO Eric Schwartz joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the future of AI depends on power grids, skilled labor, and trillion-dollar infrastructure bets. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: AI Debt Reshapes Wall Street
stories.summary: Wall Street’s AI boom is spilling into credit markets. As hyperscalers' issue huge amounts of debt, banks are buying protection to manage exposure, while hedge funds sell that protection for what looks like easy money. But if the AI race starts producing winners and losers, this quiet CDS trade could become much riskier. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Qualcomm Strikes AI Chip Deal With TikTok Owner ByteDance
stories.summary: Qualcomm Inc. reached a deal with TikTok owner ByteDance Ltd. to supply chips for artificial intelligence data centers, according to people familiar with the matter, marking a key win for a company trying to expand from smartphone processors into AI infrastructure.

stories.title: Iran is in the 'process of blinking' over the Strait of Hormuz, Petraeus says
stories.summary: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions.

stories.title: ECB 'will do what is necessary' to tame inflation, Bank of France governor tells CNBC
stories.summary: Markets are overwhelmingly pricing in a rate hike from the central bank at its next meeting.

stories.title: Optimism on Iran War Deal, AI Theme Push S&P 500 to Record Close
stories.summary: Equities notched their fourth-straight session of gains on Tuesday, with investors hopeful that an agreement to re-open the Strait of Hormuz may be near even as hostilities tested a ceasefire between the US and Iran.

stories.title: UBS’s Khan Says AI Will Have ‘Ramifications’ on Jobs
stories.summary: UBS Group AG’s Asia Pacific President Iqbal Khan said artificial intelligence will free up capacity and improve productivity but also have an impact on jobs.

stories.title: Iqbal Khan on Geopolitics, AI, and Growth
stories.summary: UBS Asia Pacific Co-President of Global Wealth Management Iqbal Khan speaks to Bloomberg's Stephen Engle as the UBS Asian Investment Conference kicks off in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Adnoc Exports Another LNG Shipment Through Hormuz to India
stories.summary: Another tanker carrying liquefied natural gas from Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has exited the Strait of Hormuz, adding to a recent uptick in energy flows through the vital waterway.

stories.title: Fireworks AI in Talks for Funding at $15 Billion Valuation
stories.summary: Fireworks AI, a startup that helps companies run artificial intelligence models, is in talks to raise a new round of funding that would value the company at $15 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.title: 'Bullying' and 'overbearing' behaviour behind abrupt BP chairman removal
stories.summary: BP declined to comment on whether bullying behaviour was part of the reason for his immediate dismissal.

stories.title: Gold Holds Loss as Traders Weigh Prospects for US-Iran Deal
stories.summary: Gold held a loss, as fresh clashes in the Persian Gulf weighed on hopes for a US-Iran peace deal and reinforced concerns that inflation could keep interest rates higher for longer.

stories.title: Ferrari shares slump after it unveils first fully electric car
stories.summary: The new Luce model has divided opinion on social media, and comes despite intense pressure from Chinese EV makers.

stories.title: UK Spy Chief Warns China Is Closing Cyber Gap With West
stories.summary: The UK and other western nations are running out of time to maintain their technological edge over China, the UK’s top cyber spy is set to warn Wednesday, urging businesses to work with intelligence officials in order to stay ahead.

stories.title: Trump Backs CFTC as Prediction Market Regulator Amid State Fight
stories.summary: President Donald Trump backed the Commodity Futures Trading Commission as the sole regulator of prediction markets, siding with the agency amid a growing legal fight with states over the multibillion-dollar industry.

stories.title: US Says Process to Form China Board of Trade to Start Shortly
stories.summary: US Trade Ambassador Jamieson Greer said his agency would issue a notice in the Federal Register “shortly” to seek public comments on a Board of Trade with China, a formal step to establish a new mechanism to manage economic relations between the two nations.

stories.title: Slim to Invest $5 Billion This Year, Won’t Seek New Pemex Bets
stories.summary: Mexican billionaire Carlos Slim is planning to invest around $5 billion this year but will steer clear of new ventures with oil driller Petroleos Mexicanos, the 86-year-old chairman emeritus of Grupo Carso said Tuesday.

stories.title: Asian Stocks Hit Record on Chip Rally, Oil Drops: Markets Wrap
stories.summary: Asian shares climbed to a record, driven by renewed momentum in technology shares and easing geopolitical tensions. Oil slipped, while the dollar weakened.

stories.title: Mubadala Offer $1.91 Billion GlobalFoundries Share Block
stories.summary: Mubadala Investment Co., Abu Dhabi’s sovereign wealth fund, is seeking to raise $1.91 billion from an unregistered block sale of GlobalFoundries Inc. shares, according to people familiar with the matter.

stories.title: Kardigan Files for IPO to Fund Cardiovascular Disease Treatment
stories.summary: Kardigan Inc. filed for a US initial public offering that will help fund three late-stage drugs that target the root cause of cardiovascular diseases.

stories.title: Trump officials split over Pope Leo’s AI warning as Vatican feud enters new front
stories.summary: Pope Leo XIV’s AI warning shows split among Trump officials as the White House resists new guardrails, upping stakes with Catholic voters and Silicon Valley allies.

stories.title: Ex-UK Premier Tony Blair Lambastes Labour’s Leadership Woes
stories.summary: Former Labour Prime Minister Tony Blair criticized the party he once led for “playing with fire” in its attempt to oust current premier Keir Starmer, while also slamming the government for lacking a clear agenda.

stories.title: ‘The market has spoken’: Ferrari shares fall after carmaker unveils first fully electric vehicle
stories.summary: Shares of luxury carmaker Ferrari fell sharply on Tuesday morning, shortly after the company launched its first fully electric vehicle.

stories.title: Apple's surge to record highs faces a major test next month. What it must do to pass
stories.summary: The iPhone maker's WWDC kicks off on June 8, offering Apple another chance to impress Wall Street on AI.

stories.summary: S&P Global Ratings has revised its outlook on Zijin Mining, mainland China’s largest mining company, to positive on the back of expanded production and stronger cost management.
